$comment: Machine-readable companion to cpf-build-spec.md. The spec is authoritative prose; this drives the build. Do not invent values marked VERIFY.
host_verify: Confirm apex vs www, pick one canonical host, 301 the other globally.

id_contract.forbidden_note: theme-toggle is the legacy hyphenated id. Purge from all page bodies; the injected header owns the toggle.

known_gaps.issue: Three headers in source (canonical chrome, drifted template inline, legacy firm <nav class='nav'>).
known_gaps.action: Keep cpf-chrome-header.html only; delete the other two everywhere.
Standardize on themeToggle; delete theme-toggle and inline toggle handlers.

known_gaps.issue: cpf-chrome.js does NOT bind the mobile drawer (mobileNav/Overlay/Close); handler only lives inline in templates (~homepage L1331).
known_gaps.action: Lift the drawer open/close handler into cpf-chrome.js once; confirm hamburger opener id in header; remove inline drawer JS from page bodies.

known_gaps.issue: Homepage inline header missing the 66-line mobile drawer block (drift).
known_gaps.action: Moot after canonical injection; never trust inline chrome copies.

known_gaps.issue: Placeholder href='#' in header/footer including social icons.
known_gaps.action: Resolve all via link_map; ship zero href='#'.

pages.note: Converge desktop + Cloudflare mobile variant into one responsive page under canonical chrome.
Replace drifted inline chrome with canonical injection.
Demo bundle; cross-check only, never deploy.

all: Externalize base/chrome CSS+JS per load order.
Delete legacy <nav class='nav'>, inline header/footer copies, theme-toggle ids, inline toggle/drawer handlers.
Wire every link via link_map; set per-page meta + self canonical.
firm_extra: Per-product accent from existing palette tokens only; never recolor --orange.

data_module.verify_rule: Unconfirmed fields keep the literal token in the content map and are suppressed from rendered output (render '—' or nothing).

row_schema.max_payout: dedicated row, never a button label

data_module.builder_rule: Copy verbatim across firms; never hand-write rows.

slot_keys.rule: Internal slot keys are immutable; map public labels to them in the content map.

single_source.rule: Comparison view and Payouts tab read the same object. Scope rerenderAllAccountCards() to #view-comparison.

link_map._rule: Resolve every href='#'. For firms already on WordPress, new path MUST equal the existing live URL (pull from current sitemap) so SEO carries over with no redirect.

social._verify: Use real profile URLs; if none, remove the icon rather than ship '#'.

validation.edit_helper: rep(old, new, expected_count) — assert exact count before replace; fail = write nothing.
per_page_gates: node --check each <script> block (firm pages: expect 3/3 clean)
Playwright headless Chromium @1200-1400px and @390px, zero console errors
chrome parity: header+footer byte-identical to canonical partials (normalized ws)
id contract: 0 theme-toggle; exactly one siteNav/themeToggle/footDisc; drawer ids present
links: 0 href='#'; all internal links resolve; canonical self-referential absolute
canonicalization lint: every comparable value matches cpf-canonical-phrases.json; no ‹VERIFY› rendered
asset order: base → chrome → page css; chrome.js before page js
site_gates: Shared values render identical strings across firms (cross-page diff)
Each URL served from exactly one place (new build XOR WordPress)
validation.deliver: present_files only after all gates pass
